elements.reasoning: Hero glyph upper-left so it doesn't compete with the centred subject. Breathing scale + chalk halo + grain — calmer than the sticker stack below.
One large pink hand-drawn heart in the upper-left zone, scale-pops in on entry then pulses softly. The cluster's visual anchor.
Three medium pink hearts drop in from above with bouncy settle, then slowly drift in figure-eight loops.
Four small red hearts stamp in (1.5→1 + ±5° wobble) staggered across the cluster, then keep their hand-drawn ambient wiggle.

global_style.vibe: minimal hand-drawn picturebook with IG-Reels animation pacing — pink + red + white only, single chalk hero glyph upper-left, clustered outlined hearts cascade in (scale_pop → drop_in → stamp) with idle pulse / drift / wiggle keeping everything alive
